## Summary
- REQUIRED

## Validation
- REQUIRED
- Large change pre-push local CI(Act) result: REQUIRED (`docs/ops/local-ci-with-act.md`)

## Core API Impact (required when touching core/include/server/core/**)
- API boundary classification touched: REQUIRED
- Stable header changed: REQUIRED
- Breaking change on Stable API: REQUIRED
- Migration note path (required if breaking=yes): REQUIRED
- Compatibility matrix updated (docs/core-api/compatibility-matrix.json): REQUIRED
- Public API version updated (core/include/server/core/api/version.hpp): REQUIRED
- Docs updated (docs/core-api/** or docs/core-api-boundary.md): REQUIRED
- Public API smoke check command/result: REQUIRED
